name: section/hero
description: Page hero section — centered or split layout with eyebrow, title, description, actions and media slots. Replace demo content before shipping.

meta.name: Hero
meta.description: Page hero section — centered or split layout with eyebrow, title, description, actions and media slots. Replace demo content before shipping.

props.name: variant
props.description: Layout variant: centered (single column) or split (two columns)

props.name: eyebrow
props.description: Small monospace label above the title

props.name: actions
props.description: Buttons or links rendered in a row below the description

props.name: media
props.description: Right-hand slot in the split variant (image, demo, code block)

props.name: headingLevel
props.description: HTML heading level for document outline control

examples.title: Centered hero
examples.code: <Hero eyebrow="v8 — Assembly Included" title="Ship the dashboard your ops team deserves" description="Cascade gives you charts, layouts and sections — fully composed, copy-paste ready." actions={<><Button>Get started</Button><Button variant="ghost">View docs</Button></>} />
examples.description: Single-column hero with eyebrow, headline, description, and CTA buttons

examples.title: Split hero
examples.code: Start building} media={} />
examples.description: Two-column layout with copy on the left and media on the right

whenToUse: The primary page intro with eyebrow, title, description, actions, and media
Landing-page tops in centered or split layout
whenNotToUse: An application page top — use PageHeader
A mid-page conversion prompt — use Cta

related.name: PageHeader
related.reason: Use for app pages rather than marketing landings

related.name: Cta
related.reason: Reinforce the hero with a CTA band later on the page

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a section with the page-level heading as its primary landmark.
